# Implementation Summary: Organic Growth Strategy - Week 1

**Date:** March 27, 2026
**Status:** Complete

---

## What Was Implemented

### 1. GitHub Community Infrastructure

**Issue Templates** (`.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`)
- Bug report template with environment details
- Feature request template with use case analysis
- Question template for community support
- Config with Discord community link

**Benefits:**
- Structured feedback collection
- Reduced support burden
- Better issue triage
- Community self-service

### 2. Community Documentation

**Discord Guide** (`.github/DISCORD-GUIDE.md`)
- Channel structure and purposes
- Getting started guide for new members
- Community events (office hours, challenges, hackathons)
- Roles and recognition system
- Best practices for asking/helping

**Community Guidelines** (`.github/COMMUNITY-GUIDELINES.md`)
- Core values (inclusivity, collaboration, transparency)
- Expected and unacceptable behavior
- Reporting process
- Content guidelines

**Contributing Guide** (`CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- Quick start for contributors
- Development setup instructions
- Contribution types (code, docs, community)
- Contributor program levels
- PR process and standards

### 3. Content Created

**Tutorial Blog Post**
- "Getting Started with AIReady CLI: Make Your Codebase AI-Ready in 5 Minutes"
- Step-by-step guide with code examples
- Real-world results showcase
- Clear call-to-actions

**Launch Blog Post**
- "Why Your AI Coding Assistant Gets Worse Over Time"
- Problem/solution format
- Data-driven insights
- Community invitation

### 4. README Updates

**Main README**
- Added Discord badge
- Added Contributing link
- Added Community section with events

**VS Code Extension README**
- Added Discord badge
- Added "Why AIReady?" pain points
- Added Community section

---

| Metric | Baseline | Week 2 Target |
|--------|----------|---------------|
| Discord members | 0 | 50 |
| GitHub stars | ~300 | 350 |
| Issue templates used | 0 | 5 |
| Blog post views | 0 | 500 |

## Alignment with Strategy

This implementation covers **Week 1-2** of the organic growth strategy:

| Strategy Element | Status |
|------------------|--------|
| Community foundation | ✅ Discord guide, guidelines |
| Content foundation | ✅ Tutorial, launch post |
| Distribution optimization | ✅ README updates, keywords |
| Product readiness | ✅ Issue templates |

See: [ORGANIC-GROWTH-STRATEGY.md](./ORGANIC-GROWTH-STRATEGY.md) for full plan.
